flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Seattle Pacific University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 1.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Seattle Pacific University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.1k vs 2.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Seattle Pacific University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.6k → $40.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Seattle Pacific University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.6k → $40.4k).
